message.content:
Read the file /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/page-mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.php and find the reviews or testimonials section (look for "testimonials", "reviews", "patient stories" etc). Return the complete HTML/PHP markup for that section.

Also read /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/scss/pages/mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.scss and return the SCSS for that same reviews/testimonials section.

Also read /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/js/pages/mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.bundle.js and return any JS for the reviews/testimonials carousel/slider.

Return all three.

content.text: I'll read those three files and find the reviews/testimonials sections for you.
